description: In the closing moments, Daisy and Robbie cross paths again after the night’s chaotic events. Robbie reveals that he may be at the center of the recent supernatural occurrences, hinting at a deeper connection between himself, the ghosts, and the dark events surrounding them. Their conversation cements their uneasy alliance moving forward.

transcript.line: Come on, come on, come on, come on. Come on!
Good. You want to know what's connecting these things.
I think it might be me.
